plan.extensionRuntimeNote: Live RPC witness disables extensions to avoid user/global extension side effects; generated extension policy is statically validated, while skills/prompts are live-loaded.

commands.name: vibe-brainstorm
commands.description: Invoke the generated brainstorm skill protocol with a persisted artifact handoff requirement.

commands.name: vibe-build
commands.description: Invoke the generated build skill protocol with a persisted artifact handoff requirement.

commands.name: vibe-grill-me
commands.description: Invoke the generated grill-me skill protocol with a persisted artifact handoff requirement.

commands.name: vibe-plan
commands.description: Invoke the generated plan skill protocol with a persisted artifact handoff requirement.

commands.name: vibe-ship
commands.description: Invoke the generated ship skill protocol with a persisted artifact handoff requirement.

commands.name: vibe-task
commands.description: Invoke the generated task skill protocol with a persisted artifact handoff requirement.

commands.name: skill:brainstorm
commands.description: Explore unclear raw intent and persist one Work Brief for plan intake. Use through /skill:brainstorm when the locked DL-03 brainstorm protocol is needed.

commands.name: skill:build
commands.description: Consume an approved Implementation Plan and produce a Build Result after implementation and verification evidence. Use through /skill:build when the locked DL-03 build protocol is needed.

commands.name: skill:grill-me
commands.description: Pressure-test assumptions and persist one Work Brief for plan intake. Use through /skill:grill-me when the locked DL-03 grill-me protocol is needed.

commands.name: skill:plan
commands.description: Consume exactly one Work Brief and produce an Implementation Plan with Verification Delta. Use through /skill:plan when the locked DL-03 plan protocol is needed.

commands.name: skill:ship
commands.description: Consume a Build Result and produce a Ship Packet; push or PR creation requires explicit approval. Use through /skill:ship when the locked DL-03 ship protocol is needed.

commands.name: skill:task
commands.description: Normalize a concrete request and persist one Work Brief for plan intake. Use through /skill:task when the locked DL-03 task protocol is needed.
